shared_properties: Torch pickup keeps the 8x16 px footprint described in the GDD and uses the same amber family as the HP icon.
Flame motion stays subtle so the pickup remains legible in narrow shafts and on dark floors.
differences: This sheet adds a four-frame flame loop that distinguishes the heal pickup from static wall torches in the backdrop.

reference_images.label: Slip Down GDD mirror
reference_images.purpose: Pickup size, heal rule, and amber color grounding.

reference_images.label: Slip Down moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Warm light contrast inside cold dungeon spaces grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout for the flame loop and attach the visual to a collectible entity with a simple trigger collider.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/torch_pickup_sheet.png through AssetServer and bind it to the heal-pickup visual recipe keyed by asset_key.
runtime_notes: Glow should not exceed the 8x16 frame bounds.

context.role: Rare heal pickup that restores one HP when touched.
context.usage: Placed sparingly in stages where the player has lost health and needs a recovery option.

deliverables.notes: Four 8x16 frames for the heal-pickup flame loop.
Single idle_loop clip definition for the heal pickup.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 32x16 px with four 8x16 frames.
Amber flame remains readable against the abyss background and does not exceed the frame bounds.
Pickup silhouette stays distinct from wall lighting because the handle and flame shape remain centered in all frames.
